task.goal: Donate twenty-five dollars monthly to the clean water fund campaign. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal (not a later confirmation, checkout, or competitor trap).

standardSteps.note: Many decoy buttons, ads, and domain-specific layout noise
Finds correct primary CTA in page-specific structure

agentdomSteps.note: Structured page landmark with typed actions
Direct WCI node click on annotated overlay

singleShot.goal: Donate twenty-five dollars monthly to the clean water fund campaign.

multiStep.title: Constraint-driven Completion
multiStep.goal: Donate twenty-five dollars monthly to the clean water fund campaign. Complete with explicit verification and no decoy interactions. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal (not a later confirmation, checkout, or competitor trap).
prerequisites: Stay on current app flow (avoid external navigation)
completionCriteria: Final action uses ground-truth selector: button[data-fund="water"][data-amt="25"]

standardFlow.step: Observe page state and locate [target] section
Narrow candidate controls using constraints in goal text
Reject promotional/nav decoys and unrelated duplicate CTAs
Confirm expected transition or state change

wciFlow.step: Read page landmark node and scope context

multiStep.title: Validation + Final Action
multiStep.goal: Donate twenty-five dollars monthly to the clean water fund campaign. First validate key constraints (preset amounts) then execute and verify. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal (not a later confirmation, checkout, or competitor trap).
prerequisites: Stay on current app flow (avoid external navigation)
completionCriteria: Final action uses ground-truth selector: button[data-fund="water"][data-amt="25"]

standardFlow.step: Inspect candidate entities/rows/cards relevant to the goal
